meta.title: S1 E4: This Week in Spaceflight History - Opportunity Mars Rover
meta.description:
Each week I take The Orbital Mechanics podcast's series "This week in Spaceflight History" and I recreate the mission in Kerbal Space Program with my friend Uncle Dad. This week's mission, Opportunity Mars Rover landed on Mars on January 25th, 2004!!!

Tune in LIVE ever Wednesday at 9:00 Central (3:00 UTC) to join the action at http://twitch.tv/everydayastronaut

Make sure and check out the Orbital Mechanics Podcast each week to get the run down on the mission!
